experiment_title: 乙醛的银镜反应（斑氏试验）

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="乙醛的银镜反应（斑氏试验）" goal="通过加热乙醛与氢氧化铜混合液，观察生成砖红色沉淀，验证乙醛的还原性。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20mL" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp_1" type="alcohol_lamp" />
      <Component id="test_tube_holder_1" type="test_tube_holder" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="NaOH_10pct_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="CuSO4_5pct_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Acetaldehyde_solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NaOH" volume="2 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="CuSO4" volume="0.25 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_1" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="CH3CHO" volume="0.2 mL" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_4" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_holder_1" id="step_5" />
      <Heat vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="60s" id="step_7" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 在试管中依次加入氢氧化钠溶液和硫酸铜溶液，静置片刻后再加入乙醛溶液，充分混合，为反应做准备。
将装有混合液的试管固定在试管夹上，并用酒精灯加热，促进反应进行，观察是否生成砖红色沉淀。
